studio.title: AI Studio
studio.backgroundBusy: Agent is running in the background — switch to the Agent tab
agent.llmNotConfigured: LLM is not configured — open the Status tab.
agent.mode.label: Mode
agent.mode.hint.auto: Auto: simple tasks run immediately; complex ones plan first
agent.mode.hint.plan: Plan: plan and approve before changing the platform
agent.mode.hint.execute: Execute: act immediately without clarifying questions
agent.mode.hint.ask: Ask: answer only — no platform changes
agent.plan.title: Plan
agent.approveBanner: Mutating tools are blocked until you approve the plan.
agent.plan.approveMessage: I approve the plan, start execution
agent.plan.refinePlanMessage: Refine the plan: close every item under «Before approval» — add missing sections, enrich summary/steps/deliverables, gapMatrix and handoffFrame.
agent.exportAuditTitle: Download CSV audit log for this chat (admin)
agent.emptyHint: Ask in plain language — I'll clarify what's unclear and suggest next steps. Pick a topic below or write your own message.
agent.attachments.attachTitle: Attach a text file (JSON, BPMN, XML, …)
agent.attachments.hintTextOnly: Text files only — current model does not support images
agent.attachments.hintWithImages: Drop files here or attach images and text files
agent.attachments.unsupported: This file type is not supported.
agent.attachments.visionNotSupported: Current model does not support images. Attach text files only, or switch to a vision-capable model.
agent.pickOption: Pick an option or refine your request:
agent.tableTruncated: Showing a preview — open the table for the full result.
agent.suggest.explore: What devices and dashboards are on the platform?
agent.suggest.snmp: Create an SNMP demo device with metrics and a monitoring dashboard
agent.suggest.report: List available reports and help me pick one to run
agent.suggest.scada: Help me build or extend a SCADA mimic screen
agent.suggest.bundle: Explain how to package and deploy an application bundle
agent.details.waiting: Waiting for the first tool step…
agent.welcomeExtended: Describe a task in plain language — for example, create an SNMP device, configure metrics and a dashboard. Chat context persists across tabs and page reloads.
agent.documents.title: Chat documents
agent.documents.hint: Upload TZ/spec text files — the agent can search them in this session.
agent.metrics.title: Agent metrics (7 days)
bundle.notPublishable: Generated package cannot be published — fix validation errors or change the prompt.
bundle.noDeployHistory: No deployment history for this appId yet.
settings.restoreLastChat: Restore last chat when opening console
settings.activeRootHint: Current root path of active session: {{path}}.
settings.persistenceHint: Chats and pending requests are saved in the browser and continue on the server even if you switch tabs or close the window.
settings.chatCountHint: Chats in list: {{count}}. Data is stored in this browser's localStorage; server sessions are not deleted when clearing the list.
settings.missingApiKeyAfter: in the repository root .env file and start the server via
settings.missingProviderAfter: in server configuration (or environment variables) and restart ispf-server
status.subtitle: LLM provider, context pack, and agent tool catalog
status.toolsIntro: Tools the platform agent can call during a turn
status.referenceScenariosIntro: Spec→validate→deploy paths covered by automated regression tests
prefs.title: Agent preferences
prefs.subtitle: Local browser settings — behavior and chat list
copilot.title: Admin Copilot
copilot.subtitle: Dedicated screen helper (not AI Studio) — answers from live UI, no deep chat history
copilot.placeholder: Ask about this screen or the platform…
copilot.llmUnavailable: LLM is not available. Open AI Studio → Status.
copilot.suggest.bindings: Help me write or fix a CEL binding expression
copilot.suggest.explain: Explain what I should do on this screen
copilot.suggest.explainExpression: Explain this live CEL draft (what it computes)
copilot.suggest.explainRule: Explain this binding rule and what it does
copilot.suggest.explainComputations: Explain the computations and bindings on this object
copilot.suggest.explainScreen: Explain what to do on this System/Settings screen
copilot.suggest.explainStudio: Explain the current AI Studio tab vs Admin Copilot
copilot.suggest.draftFromSamples: Draft CEL/filter from the journal rows on this screen
copilot.suggest.configureWidget: Configure the selected widget fields from live focus
copilot.suggest.addWidget: Propose a widget and binding for this dashboard
copilot.suggest.draftExpression: Write an expression/query from current screen data
copilot.suggest.dashboard: Help me improve this dashboard layout
copilot.suggest.scada: Help me with this SCADA mimic
copilot.suggest.systemLookup: Look up related objects on the platform for this context
